Bash(git -C "D:\\Hexalith.EventStore" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Story 1.2: Contracts package - Event Envelope & Core Types

Implement all Contracts package types with zero external dependencies:
- AggregateIdentity with full validation and 6 key derivation properties
- IdentityParser for bidirectional canonical string parsing
- EventMetadata \(11 fields\) with SequenceNumber >= 1 validation \(FR12\)
- EventEnvelope with defensive copy of Extensions and null checks
- IEventPayload/IRejectionEvent marker interfaces
- CommandEnvelope with eager field validation and defensive Extensions copy
- CommandStatus enum \(8 explicit values 0-7\)
- CommandStatusRecord with terminal-state nullable fields
- DomainResult with factory methods and mixed-event rejection

Code review fixes included: SequenceNumber validation, defensive dictionary
copies, eager CommandEnvelope validation, null checks on Payload/Metadata.
147 tests passing. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\Hexalith.EventStore" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Story 1.4: Testing Package - In-Memory Test Helpers

Adds Testing NuGet package with InMemoryStateManager, FakeDomainServiceInvoker,
fluent builders \(CommandEnvelope, AggregateIdentity, EventEnvelope\), and
assertion helpers for unit testing domain processors without DAPR runtime.

Includes code review fixes: EventEnvelopeBuilder AggregateId consistency,
xunit.assert instead of xunit to prevent test runner crash, dead code removal.

48 unit tests, 0 errors, 0 warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C D:/Hexalith.EventStore commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Story 2.1: CommandApi Host & Minimal Endpoint Scaffolding + Story 2.2 context

Implement CommandApi with POST /api/v1/commands endpoint returning 202 Accepted
with correlation ID, Location header, and Retry-After header. Includes MediatR
pipeline with ValidationBehavior, CorrelationId middleware, GlobalExceptionHandler,
and RFC 7807 ProblemDetails error formatting. Creates Story 2.2 implementation
artifact for Command Validation & RFC 7807 Error Responses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C D:/Hexalith.EventStore gh pr create --title "Story 2.1: CommandApi Host & Story 2.2 Context" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Implements CommandApi POST `/api/v1/commands` endpoint returning 202 Accepted with correlation ID, Location header, and Retry-After header
- Adds MediatR pipeline with ValidationBehavior, CorrelationId middleware, GlobalExceptionHandler, and RFC 7807 ProblemDetails
- Creates Story 2.2 implementation artifact \(Command Validation & RFC 7807 Error Responses\) as ready-for-dev
- Updates sprint-status.yaml: Story 2.2 → ready-for-dev

## Test plan
- [x] 7 tests passing \(3 middleware unit + 1 handler unit + 3 WebApplicationFactory integration\)
- [x] Full regression suite passes across all projects

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$a = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\(""C:\\Users\\JeromePiquot\\.nuget\\packages\\mediatr\\14.0.0\\lib\\net10.0\\MediatR.dll""\); foreach\($t in $a.GetExportedTypes\(\)\) { if\($t.Name -match ""RequestHandler""\) { Write-Output \($t.FullName + "" IsDelegate="" + $t.BaseType.Name\) } }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$a = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\(""C:\\Users\\JeromePiquot\\.nuget\\packages\\mediatr\\14.0.0\\lib\\net8.0\\MediatR.dll""\); foreach\($t in $a.GetExportedTypes\(\)\) { if\($t.Name -match ""RequestHandler""\) { $m = $t.GetMethod\(""Invoke""\); if\($m\) { Write-Output \($t.FullName + "" ReturnType="" + $m.ReturnType.Name + "" Params="" + $m.GetParameters\(\).Length\); foreach\($p in $m.GetParameters\(\)\) { Write-Output \(""  Param: "" + $p.Name + "" "" + $p.ParameterType.Name\) } } else { Write-Output \($t.FullName + "" \(interface/class, not delegate\)""\) } } }')
